title: Polyrepo split: PlayCua + bare-cua merge Phase 1
summary: Consolidated the canonical Rust workspace under PlayCua with native as the workspace member.
Renamed the merged Rust crate from bare-cua-native to playcua-native at version 0.1.0.
Renamed the Rust library crate from bare_cua_native to playcua_native.
Renamed CLI and MCP binaries to playcua-cli and playcua-mcp.
Aligned Python package metadata and package directory to playcua.
Added DEPRECATED_BARE_CUA.md and README banner documenting bare-cua as a frozen separate repository.

notes: Initial default-target builds blocked on a shared Cargo artifact lock.
Isolated target directory avoided cross-worktree artifact lock contention.
Build completed with existing dead-code warnings only.
